sourceSnapshot.scope: Pinned complete City of Vancouver Public trees inventory, projected to required source fields, canonically sorted by stable asset_id, and gzip-compressed with deterministic metadata.

foodSiteSourceSnapshot.scope: Pinned complete 170-record site-level snapshot. Records describe gardens and/or associated food-tree sites, not individual tree specimens or harvesting permission.

access.note: This record does not grant access or harvesting permission.
